papers.abstract: High-precision integer multiplication is crucial in privacy-preserving computational techniques but poses acceleration challenges on GPUs due to its complexity and the diverse bit lengths in cryptosystems. This paper introduces GIM, an efficient high-precision integer multiplication algorithm accelerated with GPUs. It employs a novel segmented integer multiplication algorithm that separates implementation details from bit length, facilitating code optimizations. We also present a computation diagram to analyze parallelization strategies, leading to a series of enhancements. Experiments demonstrate that this approach achieves a 4.47× speedup over the commonly used baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 高精度整数乘法对于隐私保护计算技术至关重要，但由于其复杂性和密码系统中不同的位长度，给 GPU 带来了加速挑战。本文介绍了 GIM，一种使用 GPU 加速的高效高精度整数乘法算法。它采用新颖的分段整数乘法算法，将实现细节与位长度分开，从而促进代码优化。我们还提供了一个计算图来分析并行化策略，从而带来一系列的增强。实验表明，这种方法比常用的基线实现了 4.47 倍的加速。

papers.title: POSTER: Enabling Extreme-Scale Phase Field Simulation with In-situ Feature Extraction.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present an integrated framework composed of a highly efficient phase field simulator and an in-situ feature extraction library. This novel framework enables us to conduct extreme-scale micro-structure evolution simulations while the characteristic features of each individual grain are extracted on the fly. After systematic design and optimization on the new generation Sunway supercomputer, the code scales up to 39 million cores and achieves 582 PFlops in double precision and 637 POps in mixed precision.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个由高效相场模拟器和原位特征提取库组成的集成框架。这种新颖的框架使我们能够进行超大规模的微观结构演化模拟，同时动态提取每个颗粒的特征。经过在新一代神威超级计算机上的系统设计和优化，代码扩展至3900万核，双精度达到582 PFlops，混合精度达到637 POps。

papers.title: POSTER: FineCo: Fine-grained Heterogeneous Resource Management for Concurrent DNN Inferences.
papers.abstract: Co-locating multiple DNN servings to share GPU resource is widely used to improve resource utilization while guaranteeing user QoS. Existing GPU sharing mechanism is restricted to model level, and fluctuations in kernel-level resource demands highlight a suboptimal utilization of the current sharing mechanism. We design a multi-DNN serving system, FineCo, that leverages a novel fine-grained resource sharing mechanism to optimize concurrent inference without modifications to the hardware or operating system. Our prototype implementation demonstrates that FineCo achieves up to 40% throughput improvement over the state-of-the-art work.
papers.abstract_zh: 共置多个 DNN 服务以共享 GPU 资源被广泛使用，以在保证用户 QoS 的同时提高资源利用率。现有的GPU共享机制仅限于模型级别，内核级资源需求的波动凸显了当前共享机制的次优利用。我们设计了一个多 DNN 服务系统 FineCo，它利用新颖的细粒度资源共享机制来优化并发推理，而无需修改硬件或操作系统。我们的原型实施表明，FineCo 的吞吐量比最先进的工作提高了 40%。

papers.title: POSTER: LLM-PQ: Serving LLM on Heterogeneous Clusters with Phase-Aware Partition and Adaptive Quantization.
POSTER: OCToPus: Semantic-aware Concurrency Control for Blockchain Transactions.
papers.abstract: Many blockchain implementations offer APIs to send and receive money between accounts exclusively. In this paper, we introduce OCToPus, a deterministic concurrency control scheme that uses a semantic-aware fast path and a GPU-accelerated directed acyclic graph-based fallback path to parallelize the execution of a block aggressively.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多区块链实现提供 API 来专门在账户之间发送和接收资金。在本文中，我们介绍了 OCToPus，这是一种确定性并发控制方案，它使用语义感知快速路径和 GPU 加速的基于有向无环图的后备路径来积极并行化块的执行。

papers.title: POSTER: Optimizing Collective Communications with Error-bounded Lossy Compression for GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: GPU-aware collective communication has become a major bottleneck for modern computing platforms as GPU computing power rapidly rises. To address this issue, traditional approaches integrate lossy compression directly into GPU-aware collectives, which still suffer from serious issues such as underutilized GPU devices and uncontrolled data distortion. In this paper, we propose GPU-LCC, a general framework that designs and optimizes GPU-aware, compression-enabled collectives with well-controlled error propagation. To validate our framework, we evaluate the performance on up to 64 NVIDIA A100 GPUs with real-world applications and datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that our GPU-LCC-accelerated collective computation (Allreduce), can outperform NCCL as well as Cray MPI by up to 3.4× and 18.7×, respectively. Furthermore, our accuracy evaluation with an image-stacking application confirms the high reconstructed data quality of our accuracy-aware framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着GPU计算能力的迅速提升，GPU感知的集体通信已成为现代计算平台的主要瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，传统方法将有损压缩直接集成到 GPU 感知的集合中，但这些集合仍然面临 GPU 设备未充分利用和不受控制的数据失真等严重问题。在本文中，我们提出了 GPU-LCC，这是一个通用框架，用于设计和优化 GPU 感知、支持压缩的集合，并具有良好控制的错误传播。为了验证我们的框架，我们使用真实应用程序和数据集评估了多达 64 个 NVIDIA A100 GPU 的性能。实验结果表明，我们的 GPU-LCC 加速集体计算 (Allreduce) 的性能比 NCCL 和 Cray MPI 分别高出 3.4 倍和 18.7 倍。此外，我们使用图像堆叠应用程序进行的准确性评估证实了我们的准确性感知框架的高重建数据质量。

papers.title: POSTER: Optimizing Sparse Tensor Contraction with Revisiting Hash Table Design.
papers.abstract: Sparse tensor contraction (SpTC) serves as an essential operation in high-performance applications. The high dimensionality of sparse tensors makes SpTC fundamentally challenging in aspects such as costly multidimensional index search, extensive intermediate output data, and indirect addressing. Previous state-of-the-art work addresses some of these challenges through hash-table implementation. In this paper, we propose a hash-table based and fully optimized SpTC by providing a more carefully designed customized hash table design, proposing an architecture-aware algorithm for hash table selection with size prediction, applying cross-stage optimizations to exploit shared information and avoid redundant operations. Evaluating on a set of tensors extracted from the real world, our method can achieve superior speedup and reduce the memory footprint substantially compared to the current state-of-the-art work.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量收缩（SpTC）是高性能应用程序中的一项重要操作。稀疏张量的高维性使得 SpTC 在昂贵的多维索引搜索、广泛的中间输出数据和间接寻址等方面面临着根本性的挑战。以前最先进的工作通过哈希表实现解决了其中一些挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于哈希表且完全优化的 SpTC，通过提供更仔细设计的定制哈希表设计，提出一种用于哈希表选择和大小预测的架构感知算法，应用跨阶段优化来利用共享信息并避免冗余操作。通过评估从现实世界中提取的一组张量，与当前最先进的工作相比，我们的方法可以实现卓越的加速并大大减少内存占用。

papers.title: POSTER: ParGNN: Efficient Training for Large-Scale Graph Neural Network on GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: Full-batch graph neural network (GNN) training is essential for interdisciplinary applications. Large-scale graph data is usually divided into subgraphs and distributed across multiple compute units to train GNN. The state-of-the-art load balancing method based on direct graph partition is too rough to effectively achieve true load balancing on GPU clusters. We propose ParGNN, which employs a profiler-guided load balance workflow in conjunction with graph repartition to alleviate load imbalance and minimize communication traffic. Experiments have verified that ParGNN has the capability to scale to larger clusters.
papers.abstract_zh: 全批量图神经网络（GNN）训练对于跨学科应用至关重要。大规模图数据通常被划分为子图并分布在多个计算单元上来训练 GNN。基于直接图划分的最先进的负载均衡方法过于粗糙，无法有效地在 GPU 集群上实现真正的负载均衡。我们提出 ParGNN，它采用分析器引导的负载平衡工作流程与图重新分区相结合，以减轻负载不平衡并最大限度地减少通信流量。实验验证了 ParGNN 具有扩展到更大集群的能力。

papers.title: POSTER: Pattern-Aware Sparse Communication for Scalable Recommendation Model Training.
papers.abstract: Recommendation models are an important category of deep learning models whose size is growing enormous. They consist of a sparse part with TBs of memory footprint and a dense part that demands PFLOPs of computing capability to train. Unfortunately, the high sparse communication cost to re-organize data for different parallel strategies of the two parts impedes the scalability in training.
papers.abstract_zh: 推荐模型是深度学习模型的一个重要类别，其规模正在变得巨大。它们由具有 TB 级内存占用的稀疏部分和需要 PFLOP 级计算能力进行训练的密集部分组成。不幸的是，为两个部分的不同并行策略重新组织数据的高稀疏通信成本阻碍了训练的可扩展性。

papers.title: POSTER: RadiK: Scalable Radix Top-K Selection on GPUs.
papers.abstract: By identifying the k largest or smallest elements in a set of data, top-k selection is critical for modern high-performance databases and machine learning systems, especially with large data volumes. However, previous studies on its GPU implementation are mostly merge-based and rely heavily on the high-speed but size-limited on-chip memory, thereby resulting in a restricted upper bound on k. This paper introduces RadiK, a highly optimized GPU-parallel radix top-k selection that is scalable with k, input length, and batch size. With a carefully designed optimization framework targeting high memory bandwidth and resource utilization, RadiK supports far larger k than the prior art, achieving up to 2.5× speedup for non-batch queries and up to 4.8× speedup for batch queries. We also propose a lightweight refinement that strengthens the robustness of RadiK against skewed distributions by adaptively scaling the input elements.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过识别一组数据中 k 个最大或最小的元素，top-k 选择对于现代高性能数据库和机器学习系统至关重要，尤其是在数据量较大的情况下。然而，之前对其GPU实现的研究大多是基于合并的，并且严重依赖高速但大小有限的片上存储器，从而导致k的上限受到限制。本文介绍了 RadiK，一种高度优化的 GPU 并行基数 top-k 选择，可根据 k、输入长度和批量大小进行扩展。凭借针对高内存带宽和资源利用率精心设计的优化框架，RadiK 支持远大于现有技术的 k，实现非批量查询高达 2.5 倍的加速，批量查询高达 4.8 倍的加速。我们还提出了一种轻量级改进，通过自适应缩放输入元素来增强 RadiK 针对偏斜分布的鲁棒性。

papers.title: POSTER: RELAX: Durable Data Structures with Swift Recovery.
papers.abstract: Recent non-volatile main memory technology gave rise to an abundance of research on building persistent data structures, whose content can be recovered after a system crash. While there has been significant progress in making durable data structures efficient, shortening the length of the recovery phase after a crash has not received much attention. In this paper we present the RELAX general transformation. RELAX generates lock-free durable data structures that provide the best of both worlds: almost zero recovery time and high performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的非易失性主存储器技术引发了关于构建持久数据结构的大量研究，其内容可以在系统崩溃后恢复。尽管在提高持久数据结构的效率方面取得了重大进展，但缩短崩溃后恢复阶段的长度并没有引起太多关注。在本文中，我们提出了 RELAX 一般变换。 RELAX 生成无锁的持久数据结构，提供两全其美的功能：几乎零恢复时间和高性能。

papers.title: POSTER: StructMG: A Fast and Scalable Structured Multigrid.
papers.abstract: Parallel multigrid is widely used as preconditioners in solving large-scale sparse linear systems. However, the current multigrid library still needs more satisfactory performance for structured grid problems regarding speed and scalability. To this end, we design and implement StructMG, a fast and scalable multigrid that constructs hierarchical grids automatically based on the original matrix. As a preconditioner, StructMG can achieve both low cost per iteration and good convergence. Two idealized and five real-world problems from four application fields, including radiation hydrodynamics, petroleum reservoir simulation, numerical weather prediction, and solid mechanics, are evaluated on ARM and X86 platforms. In comparison to hypre's multigrid preconditioners, StructMG achieves the fastest time-to-solutions in all cases with average speedups of 17.6x, 5.7x, 4.6x, 8.5x over SMG, PFMG, SysPFMG, and BoomerAMG, respectively. Additionally, StructMG significantly improves strong and weak scaling efficiencies in most tests.
papers.abstract_zh: 并行多重网格广泛用作求解大规模稀疏线性系统的预处理器。然而，当前的多重网格库在速度和可扩展性方面仍然需要更令人满意的性能来解决结构化网格问题。为此，我们设计并实现了 StructMG，这是一种快速且可扩展的多重网格，可以根据原始矩阵自动构建分层网格。作为预处理器，StructMG 可以实现每次迭代的低成本和良好的收敛性。在 ARM 和 X86 平台上评估了辐射流体动力学、石油储层模拟、数值天气预报和固体力学等四个应用领域的两个理想问题和五个现实问题。与 hypre 的多重网格预处理器相比，StructMG 在所有情况下都实现了最快的解决方案时间，比 SMG、PFMG、SysPFMG 和 BoomerAMG 平均加速分别为 17.6 倍、5.7 倍、4.6 倍、8.5 倍。此外，StructMG 在大多数测试中显着提高了强扩展和弱扩展效率。

papers.title: Practical Hardware Transactional vEB Trees.
papers.abstract: van Emde Boas (vEB) trees are sequential data structures optimized for extremely fast predecessor and successor queries. Such queries are an important incentive to use ordered sets or maps such as vEB trees. All operations in a vEB tree are doubly logarithmic in the universe size. Attempts to implement concurrent vEB trees have either simplified their structure in a way that eliminated their ability to perform fast predecessor and successor queries, or have otherwise compromised on doubly logarithmic complexity. In this work, we leverage Hardware Transactional Memory (HTM) to implement vEB tree-based sets and maps in which operations are doubly logarithmic in the absence of contention. Our proposed concurrent vEB tree is the first to implement recursive summaries, the key algorithmic component of fast predecessor and successor operations. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art concurrent maps by an average of 5× in a moderately skewed workload, and the single-threaded C++ standard ordered map and its unordered map by 70% and 14%, respectively. And, it does so while using two orders of magnitude less memory than traditional vEB trees.
papers.abstract_zh: van Emde Boas (vEB) 树是针对极快的前驱和后继查询而优化的顺序数据结构。此类查询是使用有序集或映射（例如 vEB 树）的重要动机。 vEB 树中的所有操作在宇宙大小上都是双对数的。实现并发 vEB 树的尝试要么简化了其结构，从而消除了执行快速前驱和后继查询的能力，要么在双对数复杂性上做出了妥协。在这项工作中，我们利用硬件事务内存（HTM）来实现基于 vEB 树的集合和映射，其中操作在没有争用的情况下是双对数的。我们提出的并发 vEB 树是第一个实现递归摘要的树，递归摘要是快速前驱和后继操作的关键算法组件。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们的算法在适度倾斜的工作负载中比最先进的并发映射平均性能高出 5 倍，单线程 C++ 标准有序映射及其无序映射分别高出 70% 和 14%。而且，它使用的内存比传统 vEB 树少两个数量级。

papers.title: Pure: Evolving Message Passing To Better Leverage Shared Memory Within Nodes.
papers.abstract: Pure is a new programming model and runtime system explicitly designed to take advantage of shared memory within nodes in the context of a mostly message passing interface enhanced with the ability to use tasks to make use of idle cores. Pure leverages shared memory in two ways: (a) by allowing cores to steal work from each other while waiting on messages to arrive, and, (b) by leveraging efficient lock-free data structures in shared memory to achieve high-performance messaging and collective operations between the ranks within nodes. We use microbenchmarks to evaluate Pure's key messaging and collective features and also show application speedups up to 2.1× on the CoMD molecular dynamics and the miniAMR adaptive mesh refinement applications scaling up to 4,096 cores.
papers.abstract_zh: Pure 是一种新的编程模型和运行时系统，明确设计为在主要是消息传递接口的上下文中利用节点内的共享内存，并增强了使用任务来利用空闲核心的能力。 Pure 通过两种方式利用共享内存：(a) 允许核心在等待消息到达时互相窃取工作，以及 (b) 利用共享内存中高效的无锁数据结构来实现节点内队列之间的高性能消息传递和集体操作。我们使用微基准来评估 Pure 的关键消息传递和集体功能，并在 CoMD 分子动力学和可扩展至 4,096 个核心的 miniAMR 自适应网格细化应用程序上显示高达 2.1 倍的应用程序加速。

papers.title: Recurrence Analysis for Automatic Parallelization of Subscripted Subscripts.
papers.abstract: Introducing correct and optimal OpenMP parallelization directives in applications is a challenge. To parallelize a loop in an input application code automatically, parallelizing compilers need to disprove dependences with respect to variables across iterations of the loop. Performing such dependence analysis in the presence of index arrays or subscripted subscripts - a[b[i]] - has long been a challenge for automatic parallelizers. Loops with subscripted subscripts can be parallelized if the subscript array is known to possess a property such as monotonicity. This paper presents a compiletime algorithm that can analyze complex recurrence relations and determine irregular or intermittent monotonicity of one-dimensional and monotonicity of multi-dimensional subscript arrays. The new algorithm builds on a prior approach that is capable of analyzing simple recurrence relations and determining monotonic one-dimensional subscript arrays. Experimental results show that automatic parallelizers equipped with our new analysis techniques can substantially improve the performance of ten out of twelve or 83.33% of the benchmarks evaluated, 25--33.33% more than possible with state-of-the-art compile-time automatic parallelization techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 在应用程序中引入正确且最佳的 OpenMP 并行化指令是一项挑战。为了自动并行化输入应用程序代码中的循环，并行化编译器需要反驳循环迭代中变量的依赖性。在存在索引数组或下标下标 - a[b[i]] 的情况下执行此类依赖性分析长期以来一直是自动并行器的挑战。如果已知下标数组具有单调性等属性，则具有下标下标的循环可以并行化。本文提出了一种编译时算法，可以分析复杂的递推关系并确定一维的不规则或间歇单调性以及多维下标数组的单调性。新算法建立在现有方法的基础上，该方法能够分析简单的递归关系并确定单调一维下标数组。实验结果表明，配备我们新分析技术的自动并行器可以显着提高 12 项中的 10 项或所评估基准的 83.33% 的性能，比使用最先进的编译时自动并行化技术的性能提高 25--33.33%。

papers.title: Scaling Up Transactions with Slower Clocks.
papers.abstract: Concurrency controls with optimistic read accesses and pessimistic write accesses are among the fastest in the literature. However, during write transactions these algorithms need to increment an atomic variable, the central clock, limiting parallelism and preventing scalability at high core counts.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有乐观读取访问和悲观写入访问的并发控制是文献中最快的。然而，在写入事务期间，这些算法需要增加原子变量（中央时钟），从而限制并行性并阻止高核心数下的可扩展性。

papers.title: Shared Memory-contention-aware Concurrent DNN Execution for Diversely Heterogeneous System-on-Chips.
papers.abstract: Two distinguishing features of state-of-the-art mobile and autonomous systems are: 1) There are often multiple workloads, mainly deep neural network (DNN) inference, running concurrently and continuously. 2) They operate on shared memory System-on-Chips (SoC) that embed heterogeneous accelerators tailored for specific operations. State-of-the-art systems lack efficient performance and resource management techniques necessary to either maximize total system throughput or minimize end-to-end workload latency. In this work, we propose HaX-CoNN, a novel scheme that characterizes and maps layers in concurrently executing DNN inference workloads to a diverse set of accelerators within an SoC. Our scheme uniquely takes per-layer execution characteristics, shared memory (SM) contention, and inter-accelerator transitions into account to find optimal schedules. We evaluate HaX-CoNN on NVIDIA Orin, NVIDIA Xavier, and Qualcomm Snapdragon 865 SoCs. Our experimental results indicate that HaX-CoNN can minimize memory contention by up to 45% and improve total latency and throughput by up to 32% and 29%, respectively, compared to the state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh: 最先进的移动和自治系统的两个显着特征是：1）通常有多个工作负载，主要是并发且连续运行的深度神经网络（DNN）推理。 2) 它们在共享内存片上系统 (SoC) 上运行，该片上系统嵌入了针对特定操作定制的异构加速器。最先进的系统缺乏最大化总系统吞吐量或最小化端到端工作负载延迟所需的高效性能和资源管理技术。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HaX-CoNN，这是一种新颖的方案，它描述并发执行 DNN 推理工作负载中的层并将其映射到 SoC 内的一组不同的加速器。我们的方案独特地考虑了每层执行特性、共享内存 (SM) 争用和加速器间转换，以找到最佳调度。我们在 NVIDIA Orin、NVIDIA Xavier 和 Qualcomm Snapdragon 865 SoC 上评估 HaX-CoNN。我们的实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，HaX-CoNN 可以将内存争用减少高达 45%，并将总延迟和吞吐量分别提高高达 32% 和 29%。

papers.title: Sparsity in Deep Neural Nets (Keynote).
papers.abstract: Our brain executes very sparse computation, allowing for great speed and energy savings. Deep neural networks can also be made to exhibit high levels of sparsity without significant accuracy loss. As their size grows, it is becoming imperative that we use sparsity to improve their efficiency. This is a challenging task because the memory systems and SIMD operations that dominate todays CPUs and GPUs do not lend themselves easily to the irregular data patterns sparsity introduces. This talk will survey the role of sparsity in neural network computation, and the parallel algorithms and hardware features that nevertheless allow us to make effective use of it.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们的大脑执行非常稀疏的计算，从而可以提高速度并节省能源。深度神经网络也可以表现出高水平的稀疏性，而不会显着损失准确性。随着它们规模的增长，我们必须利用稀疏性来提高它们的效率。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为主导当今 CPU 和 GPU 的内存系统和 SIMD 操作不容易适应稀疏性引入的不规则数据模式。本演讲将探讨稀疏性在神经网络计算中的作用，以及允许我们有效利用它的并行算法和硬件功能。

papers.title: Tetris: Accelerating Sparse Convolution by Exploiting Memory Reuse on GPU.
papers.abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved remarkable success in various application fields. Although model compression techniques mitigate the ever-increasing resource demands of large CNN models, the compressed models usually exhibit irregular memory access and unstructured sparsity, which are difficult for dominant operators such as sparse convolution to achieve expected performance speedup on popular inference platforms such as GPU. In this paper, we propose Tetris, an efficient sparse convolution approach optimized for GPU. Tetris first fully exploits the input reuse opportunity of sparse convolution to reduce the memory accesses to global memory. It then adopts a stride packed filter (SPF) format and a bank-sensing reorganization scheme to eliminate the irregular memory accesses caused by unstructured sparsity. It also leverages a filter group reorder technique to address load imbalance among threads, and a parameter tuning method to determine the optimal parameters of the sparse convolution implementation. The experiment results show that Tetris outperforms dense/sparse convolution libraries and cutting-edge implementations with promising performance speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在各个应用领域取得了显着的成功。尽管模型压缩技术缓解了大型 CNN 模型不断增长的资源需求，但压缩后的模型通常表现出不规则的内存访问和非结构化稀疏性，这对于稀疏卷积等主导算子来说很难在 GPU 等流行的推理平台上实现预期的性能加速。在本文中，我们提出了俄罗斯方块，这是一种针对 GPU 优化的高效稀疏卷积方法。俄罗斯方块首先充分利用稀疏卷积的输入重用机会来减少对全局内存的内存访问。然后，它采用跨步打包过滤器（SPF）格式和存储体感知重组方案来消除由非结构化稀疏性引起的不规则内存访问。它还利用滤波器​​组重新排序技术来解决线程之间的负载不平衡问题，并利用参数调整方法来确定稀疏卷积实现的最佳参数。实验结果表明，俄罗斯方块的性能优于密集/稀疏卷积库和尖端实现，并且有望实现性能加速。

papers.title: Towards Scalable Unstructured Mesh Computations on Shared Memory Many-Cores.
papers.abstract: Due to data conflicts or data dependences, exploiting shared memory parallelism on unstructured mesh applications is highly challenging. The prior approaches are neither general nor scalable on emerging many-core processors. This paper presents a general and scalable shared memory approach for unstructured mesh computations. We recursively divide and reorder an unstructured mesh to construct a task dependency tree (TDT), where massive parallelism is exposed and data conflicts as well as data dependences are respected. We propose two recursion strategies to support popular programming models on both CPUs and GPUs for TDT. We evaluate our approach by applying it to an industrial unstructured Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) software. Experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms the prior shared memory approaches, delivering up to 8.1× performance improvement over the engineer-tuned implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于数据冲突或数据依赖性，在非结构化网格应用程序上利用共享内存并行性非常具有挑战性。先前的方法在新兴的多核处理器上既不通用也不可扩展。本文提出了一种用于非结构化网格计算的通用且可扩展的共享内存方法。我们递归地划分和重新排序非结构化网格来构建任务依赖树（TDT），其中暴露了大规模并行性并尊重数据冲突和数据依赖性。我们提出了两种递归策略来支持 TDT 的 CPU 和 GPU 上的流行编程模型。我们通过将其应用于工业非结构化计算流体动力学 (CFD) 软件来评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于之前的共享内存方法，与工程师调整的实现相比，性能提高了 8.1 倍。

papers.title: Training one DeePMD Model in Minutes: a Step towards Online Learning.
papers.abstract: Neural Network Molecular Dynamics (NNMD) has become a major approach in material simulations, which can speedup the molecular dynamics (MD) simulation for thousands of times, while maintaining ab initio accuracy, thus has a potential to fundamentally change the paradigm of material simulations. However, there are two time-consuming bottlenecks of the NNMD developments. One is the data access of ab initio calculation results. The other, which is the focus of the current work, is reducing the training time of NNMD model. The training of NNMD model is different from most other neural network training because the atomic force (which is related to the gradient of the network) is an important physical property to be fit. Tests show the traditional stochastic gradient methods, like the Adam algorithms, cannot efficiently deploy the multisample minibatch algorithm. As a result, a typical training (taking the Deep Potential Molecular Dynamics (DeePMD) as an example) can take many hours. In this work, we designed a heuristic minibatch quasi-Newtonian optimizer based on Extended Kalman Filter method. An early reduction of gradient and error is adopted to reduce memory footprint and communication. The memory footprint, communication and settings of hyper-parameters of this new method are analyzed in detail. Computational innovations such as customized kernels of the symmetry-preserving descriptor are applied to exploit the computing power of the heterogeneous architecture. Experiments are performed on 8 different datasets representing different real case situations, and numerical results show that our new method has an average speedup of 32.2 compared to the Reorganized Layer-wised Extended Kalman Filter with 1 GPU, reducing the absolute training time of one DeePMD model from hours to several minutes, making it one step toward online training.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络分子动力学（NNMD）已成为材料模拟的主要方法，它可以将分子动力学（MD）模拟加速数千倍，同时保持从头算的精度，因此有可能从根本上改变材料模拟的范式。然而，NNMD 的发展存在两个耗时的瓶颈。一是从头计算结果的数据访问。另一个是当前工作的重点，是减少NNMD模型的训练时间。 NNMD模型的训练与大多数其他神经网络训练不同，因为原子力（与网络的梯度有关）是需要拟合的重要物理性质。测试表明，传统的随机梯度方法（例如 Adam 算法）无法有效地部署多样本小批量算法。因此，一次典型的训练（以深势分子动力学（DeePMD）为例）可能需要几个小时。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种基于扩展卡尔曼滤波器方法的启发式小批量拟牛顿优化器。采用早期减少梯度和误差来减少内存占用和通信。详细分析了这种新方法的内存占用、通信和超参数设置。应用计算创新（例如保留对称描述符的定制内核）来利用异构架构的计算能力。在代表不同实际情况的 8 个不同数据集上进行了实验，数值结果表明，与具有 1 个 GPU 的重组分层扩展卡尔曼滤波器相比，我们的新方法平均加速为 32.2，将一个 DeePMD 模型的绝对训练时间从几小时缩短到几分钟，使其向在线训练迈出了一步。

papers.title: VERLIB: Concurrent Versioned Pointers.
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown how to augment any CAS-based concurrent data structure to support taking a snapshot of the current memory state. Taking the snapshot, as well as loads and CAS (Compare and Swap) operations, take constant time. Importantly, such snapshotting can be used to easily implement linearizable queries, such as range queries, over any part of a data structure.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的工作展示了如何增强任何基于 CAS 的并发数据结构以支持获取当前内存状态的快照。拍摄快照以及加载和 CAS（比较和交换）操作需要恒定的时间。重要的是，这种快照可用于轻松地在数据结构的任何部分实现线性化查询，例如范围查询。

papers.title: 2PLSF: Two-Phase Locking with Starvation-Freedom.
A Programming Model for GPU Load Balancing.
papers.abstract: We propose a GPU fine-grained load-balancing abstraction that decouples load balancing from work processing and aims to support both static and dynamic schedules with a programmable interface to implement new load-balancing schedules. Prior to our work, the only way to unleash the GPU's potential on irregular problems has been to workload-balance through application-specific, tightly coupled load-balancing techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种 GPU 细粒度负载平衡抽象，它将负载平衡与工作处理分离，旨在通过可编程接口支持静态和动态调度，以实现新的负载平衡调度。在我们的工作之前，释放 GPU 处理不规则问题的潜力的唯一方法是通过特定于应用程序的紧密耦合负载平衡技术来实现工作负载平衡。

papers.title: A Scalable Hybrid Total FETI Method for Massively Parallel FEM Simulations.
papers.abstract: The Hybrid Total Finite Element Tearing and Interconnecting (HTFETI) method plays an important role in solving large-scale and complex engineering problems. This method needs to handle numerous matrix-vector multiplications. Directly calling the vendor-optimized library for general matrix-vector multiplication (gemv) on GPU leads to low performance, since it does not consider optimizations for different matrix sizes in HTFETI, i.e. different row and column sizes. In addition, state-of-the-art graph partitioning methods cannot guarantee load balancing for HTFETI, since the matrix size is determined by the length of the subdomain boundary. To solve the problems above, we first port gemv to the multi-stream pipeline scheme and develop a new batched kernel function on GPU, which brings 15%~30% throughput improvement and 37% average GFLOPs improvement, respectively. We also propose a multi-grained load-balancing scheme based on graph repartitioning and work-stealing, and the load imbalance ratio is down to 1.05~1.09 from 1.5. We have successfully applied the scalable HTFETI method to simulate the whole core assembly of China Experimental Fast Reactor (CEFR) for steady-state analysis, and the efficiencies of weak scalability and strong scalability reach 78% and 72% on 12,288 GPUs, respectively. As far as we know, this is the first time that HTFETI has been used in large-scale and high-fidelity whole core assembly simulation.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合全有限元撕裂互连（HTFETI）方法在解决大规模复杂工程问题中发挥着重要作用。该方法需要处理大量的矩阵向量乘法。在 GPU 上直接调用供应商优化库进行通用矩阵向量乘法 (gemv) 会导致性能较低，因为它没有考虑针对 HTFETI 中不同矩阵大小（即不同行和列大小）的优化。此外，最先进的图划分方法无法保证 HTFETI 的负载平衡，因为矩阵大小由子域边界的长度决定。为了解决上述问题，我们首先将gemv移植到多流管道方案中，并在GPU上开发了新的批处理内核函数，分别带来了15%~30%的吞吐量提升和37%的平均GFLOPs提升。我们还提出了一种基于图重新分区和工作窃取的多粒度负载均衡方案，负载不平衡率从 1.5 降至 1.05~1.09。我们成功应用可扩展HTFETI方法对中国实验快堆（CEFR）整个堆芯组件进行稳态分析，弱可扩展和强可扩展的效率在12,288个GPU上分别达到78%和72%。据了解，这是HTFETI首次应用于大规模、高保真的整芯组装仿真。

papers.title: AArch64 Atomics: Might They Be Harming Your Performance?
Block-STM: Scaling Blockchain Execution by Turning Ordering Curse to a Performance Blessing.
papers.abstract: Block-STM Getting Started Guide This repository implements and benchmarks Block-STM and other baselines for the paper Block-STM: Scaling Blockchain Execution by Turning Ordering Curse to a Performance Blessing. The implementation of Block-STM has been merged on the main branch of the Aptos blockchain and the Diem blockchain open source codebase. Branches block_stm and aptos implement and benchmark Block-STM with Diem and Aptos peer-to-peer transactions, respectively. Similarly, branches bohm and litm implement and benchmark Bohm and LiTM with Diem peer-to-peer transactions, respectively. Step-by-Step Instructions First, checkout to the corresponding branch using git checkout, then install the dependencies using ./scripts/dev_setup.sh Run Block-STM with Diem p2p txn: cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src cargo run --release main Use taskset commands to run experiments with different threads number. For example, in step 5, run taskset -c 0-15 cargo run --release main is to use CPU core 0-15 to run Block-STM. The TPS results will show after the execution. Figure 3, 4 and 5 in the paper contains TPS results of Block-STM with Diem p2p transactions under different account number, transaction number, and number of thread. Set parameters (number of accounts/transactions/warmup-runs/runs) in diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/main.rs. let acts = [2, 10, 100, 1000, 10000]; let txns = [1000, 10000]; let num_warmups = 2; let num_runs = 10; Run sequential baseline: cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/benches cargo bench peer_to_peer The TPS results will show after the execution. Figure 3, 4 and 5 in the paper contains TPS results of sequential execution with Diem p2p transactions under different account number and transaction number. Set parameters (number of accounts/transactions) in diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/transactions.rs. /// The number of accounts created by default. pub const DEFAULT_NUM_ACCOUNTS: usize = 100; /// The number of transactions created by default. pub const DEFAULT_NUM_TRANSACTIONS: usize = 1000; Run Bohm: cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src cargo run --release main Use taskset commands to run experiments with different threads number. Set parameters in diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/main.rs. The TPS results will show after the execution, as the numbers corresponding to “AVG TPS (total execution)”. Figure 3 in the paper contains TPS results of Bohm with Diem p2p transactions under different account number, transaction number, and number of thread. Run LiTM: cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src cargo run --release main Use taskset commands to run experiments with different threads number. Set parameters in diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/main.rs. The TPS results will show after the execution. Figure 3 in the paper contains TPS results of LiTM with Diem p2p transactions under different account number, transaction number, and number of thread.
papers.abstract_zh: Block-STM 入门指南 该存储库实现了 Block-STM 以及《Block-STM：通过将排序诅咒转变为性能祝福来扩展区块链执行》一文的其他基线并对其进行了基准测试。 Block-STM 的实现已合并到 Aptos 区块链的主分支和 Diem 区块链开源代码库上。分支 block_stm 和 aptos 分别使用 Diem 和 Aptos 点对点交易实现 Block-STM 并对其进行基准测试。同样，分支 bohm 和 litm 分别通过 Diem 点对点交易实施 Bohm 和 LiTM 并对其进行基准测试。 分步说明 首先，使用 git checkout 签出到相应的分支，然后使用 ./scripts/dev_setup.sh 安装依赖项 使用 Diem p2p txn 运行 Block-STM： cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src Cargo run --release main 使用taskset命令以不同的线程数运行实验。例如，在步骤5中，运行taskset -c 0-15cargo run --release main是使用CPU核心0-15来运行Block-STM。执行后将显示 TPS 结果。论文中的图3、图4和图5包含了不同账号、交易数和线程数下Block-STM与Diem p2p交易的TPS结果。在 diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/main.rs 中设置参数（账户/交易/预热运行/运行数量）。让行为 = [2, 10, 100, 1000, 10000];让 txns = [1000, 10000];让num_warmups = 2；让 num_runs = 10; 运行顺序基线： cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/benches Cargo bench peer_to_peer 执行后将显示 TPS 结果。论文中的图3、图4和图5包含了不同账号和交易数下Diem p2p交易顺序执行的TPS结果。在 diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/transactions.rs 中设置参数（账户/交易数量）。 /// 默认创建的账户数量。 pub const DEFAULT_NUM_ACCOUNTS：usize = 100； /// 默认创建的交易数量。 pub const DEFAULT_NUM_TRANSACTIONS：usize = 1000； 运行 Bohm： cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src Cargo run --release main 使用任务集命令以不同的线程数运行实验。在 diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/main.rs 中设置参数。 TPS 结果将在执行后显示为“AVG TPS（总执行次数）”对应的数字。论文中的图3包含了Bohm与Diem p2p交易在不同账号、交易数、线程数下的TPS结果。 运行 LiTM： cd diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src Cargo run --release main 使用任务集命令以不同的线程数运行实验。在 diem-move/diem-transaction-benchmarks/src/main.rs 中设置参数。执行后将显示 TPS 结果。论文中的图3包含了LiTM与Diem p2p交易在不同账号、交易数量和线程数量下的TPS结果。

papers.title: Boosting Performance and QoS for Concurrent GPU B+trees by Combining-Based Synchronization.
papers.abstract: Concurrent B+trees have been widely used in many systems. With the scale of data requests increasing exponentially, the systems are facing tremendous performance pressure. GPU has shown its potential to accelerate concurrent B+trees performance. When many concurrent requests are processed, the conflicts should be detected and resolved. Prior methods guarantee the correctness of concurrent GPU B+trees through lock-based or software transactional memory (STM)-based approaches. However, these methods complicate the request processing logic, increase the number of memory accesses and bring execution path divergence. They lead to performance degradation and variance in response time increasing. Moreover, previous methods do not guarantee linearizability among concurrent requests.
papers.abstract_zh: 并发B+树已经在很多系统中得到了广泛的应用。随着数据请求规模呈指数级增长，系统面临着巨大的性能压力。 GPU 已显示出加速并发 B+ 树性能的潜力。当处理许多并发请求时，应该检测并解决冲突。先前的方法通过基于锁或基于软件事务内存（STM）的方法保证并发GPU B+树的正确性。然而，这些方法使请求处理逻辑复杂化，增加了内存访问次数并带来执行路径发散。它们会导致性能下降和响应时间差异增加。此外，以前的方法不能保证并发请求之间的线性化。

papers.title: CuPBoP: A Framework to Make CUDA Portable.
DSP: Efficient GNN Training with Multiple GPUs.
Dynamic N: M Fine-Grained Structured Sparse Attention Mechanism.
Efficient All-Reduce for Distributed DNN Training in Optical Interconnect Systems.
papers.abstract: All-reduce is the crucial communication primitive to reduce model parameters in distributed Deep Neural Networks (DNN) training. Most existing all-reduce algorithms are designed for traditional electrical interconnect systems, which cannot meet the communication requirements for distributed training of large DNNs due to the low data bandwidth of the electrical interconnect systems. One of the promising alternatives for electrical interconnect is optical interconnect, which can provide high bandwidth, low transmission delay, and low power cost. We propose an efficient scheme called WRHT (Wavelength Reused Hierarchical Tree) for implementing all-reduce operation in optical interconnect systems. WRHT can take advantage of WDM (Wavelength Division Multiplexing) to reduce the communication time of distributed data-parallel DNN training. Simulations using real DNN models show that, compared to all-reduce algorithms in the electrical and optical network systems, our approach reduces communication time by 75.76% and 91.86%, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: All-reduce 是减少分布式深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练中模型参数的关键通信原语。现有的all-reduce算法大多是针对传统电气互连系统设计的，由于电气互连系统的数据带宽较低，无法满足大型DNN分布式训练的通信要求。电互连最有前途的替代方案之一是光互连，它可以提供高带宽、低传输延迟和低功耗。我们提出了一种称为 WRHT（波长重用分层树）的有效方案，用于在光互连系统中实现全归约操作。 WRHT可以利用WDM（波分复用）​​来减少分布式数据并行DNN训练的通信时间。使用真实 DNN 模型的模拟表明，与电气和光网络系统中的 all-reduce 算法相比，我们的方法分别减少了 75.76% 和 91.86% 的通信时间。

papers.title: Efficient Direct Convolution Using Long SIMD Instructions.
papers.abstract: This paper demonstrates that state-of-the-art proposals to compute convolutions on architectures with CPUs supporting SIMD instructions deliver poor performance for long SIMD lengths due to frequent cache conflict misses. We first discuss how to adapt the state-of-the-art SIMD direct convolution to architectures using long SIMD instructions and analyze the implications of increasing the SIMD length on the algorithm formulation. Next, we propose two new algorithmic approaches: the Bounded Direct Convolution (BDC), which adapts the amount of computation exposed to mitigate cache misses, and the Multi-Block Direct Convolution (MBDC), which redefines the activation memory layout to improve the memory access pattern. We evaluate BDC, MBDC, the state-of-the-art technique, and a proprietary library on an architecture featuring CPUs with 16,384-bit SIMD registers using ResNet convolutions. Our results show that BDC and MBDC achieve respective speed-ups of 1.44× and 1.28× compared to the state-of-the-art technique for ResNet-101, and 1.83× and 1.63× compared to the proprietary library.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文证明，由于频繁的缓存冲突未命中，在具有支持 SIMD 指令的 CPU 的架构上计算卷积的最先进的建议对于长 SIMD 长度的性能较差。我们首先讨论如何将最先进的 SIMD 直接卷积应用于使用长 SIMD 指令的架构，并分析增加 SIMD 长度对算法公式的影响。接下来，我们提出了两种新的算法方法：有界直接卷积（BDC），它调整暴露的计算量以减少缓存未命中，以及多块直接卷积（MBDC），它重新定义激活内存布局以改进内存访问模式。我们评估了 BDC、MBDC、最先进的技术以及采用 ResNet 卷积的具有 16,384 位 SIMD 寄存器的 CPU 的架构上的专有库。我们的结果表明，与 ResNet-101 的最先进技术相比，BDC 和 MBDC 分别实现了 1.44 倍和 1.28 倍的加速，与专有库相比分别实现了 1.83 倍和 1.63 倍的加速。

papers.title: Elastic Averaging for Efficient Pipelined DNN Training.
papers.abstract: Nowadays, the size of DNN models has grown rapidly. To train a large model, pipeline parallelism-based frameworks partition the model across GPUs and slice each batch of data into multiple micro-batches. However, pipeline parallelism suffers from a bubble issue and low peak utilization of GPUs. Recent work tries to address the two issues, but fails to exploit the benefit of vanilla pipeline parallelism, i.e., overlapping communication with computation. In this work, we employ an elastic averaging-based framework which explores elastic averaging to add multiple parallel pipelines. To help the framework exploit the advantage of pipeline parallelism while reducing the memory footprints, we propose a schedule, advance forward propagation. Moreover, since the numbers of parallel pipelines and micro-batches are essential to the framework performance, we propose a profiling-based tuning method to automatically determine the settings. We integrate those techniques into a prototype system, namely AvgPipe, based on PyTorch. Our experiments show that Avg-Pipe achieves a 1.7x speedups over state-of-the-art solutions of pipeline parallelism on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，DNN 模型的规模迅速增长。为了训练大型模型，基于管道并行性的框架将模型跨 GPU 分区，并将每批数据分割为多个微批次。然而，管道并行性存在气泡问题和 GPU 峰值利用率低的问题。最近的工作试图解决这两个问题，但未能利用普通管道并行性的好处，即通信与计算重叠。在这项工作中，我们采用基于弹性平均的框架，该框架探索弹性平均以添加多个并行管道。为了帮助框架利用管道并行性的优势，同时减少内存占用，我们提出了一个时间表，提前前向传播。此外，由于并行管道和微批次的数量对于框架性能至关重要，因此我们提出了一种基于分析的调整方法来自动确定设置。我们将这些技术集成到一个原型系统中，即基于 PyTorch 的 AvgPipe。我们的实验表明，与最先进的管道并行解决方案相比，Avg-Pipe 的平均加速速度提高了 1.7 倍。

papers.title: End-to-End LU Factorization of Large Matrices on GPUs.
papers.abstract: LU factorization for sparse matrices is an important computing step for many engineering and scientific problems such as circuit simulation. There have been many efforts toward parallelizing and scaling this algorithm, which include the recent efforts targeting the GPUs. However, it is still challenging to deploy a complete sparse LU factorization workflow on a GPU due to high memory requirements and data dependencies. In this paper, we propose the first complete GPU solution for sparse LU factorization. To achieve this goal, we propose an out-of-core implementation of the symbolic execution phase, thus removing the bottleneck due to large intermediate data structures. Next, we propose a dynamic parallelism implementation of Kahn's algorithm for topological sort on the GPUs. Finally, for the numeric factorization phase, we increase the parallelism degree by removing the memory limits for large matrices as compared to the existing implementation approaches. Experimental results show that compared with an implementation modified from GLU 3.0, our out-of-core version achieves speedups of 1.13--32.65X. Further, our out-of-core implementation achieves a speedup of 1.2--2.2 over an optimized unified memory implementation on the GPU. Finally, we show that the optimizations we introduce for numeric factorization turn out to be effective.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵的 LU 分解是电路仿真等许多工程和科学问题的重要计算步骤。为了并行化和扩展该算法，人们做出了许多努力，其中包括最近针对 GPU 的努力。然而，由于高内存需求和数据依赖性，在 GPU 上部署完整的稀疏 LU 分解工作流程仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了第一个用于稀疏 LU 分解的完整 GPU 解决方案。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了符号执行阶段的核外实现，从而消除了大型中间数据结构带来的瓶颈。接下来，我们提出了 Kahn 拓扑排序算法在 GPU 上的动态并行实现。最后，对于数值分解阶段，与现有的实现方法相比，我们通过消除大矩阵的内存限制来提高并行度。实验结果表明，与 GLU 3.0 修改的实现相比，我们的核外版本实现了 1.13--32.65 倍的加速。此外，我们的核外实现比 GPU 上优化的统一内存实现实现了 1.2--2.2 的加速。最后，我们证明了我们为数值分解引入的优化是有效的。

papers.title: Exploring the Use of WebAssembly in HPC.
papers.abstract: Containerization approaches based on namespaces offered by the Linux kernel have seen an increasing popularity in the HPC community both as a means to isolate applications and as a format to package and distribute them. However, their adoption and usage in HPC systems faces several challenges. These include difficulties in unprivileged running and building of scientific application container images directly on HPC resources, increasing heterogeneity of HPC architectures, and access to specialized networking libraries available only on HPC systems. These challenges of container-based HPC application development closely align with the several advantages that a new universal intermediate binary format called WebAssembly (Wasm) has to offer. These include a lightweight userspace isolation mechanism and portability across operating systems and processor architectures. In this paper, we explore the usage of Wasm as a distribution format for MPI-based HPC applications. To this end, we present MPIWasm, a novel Wasm embedder for MPI-based HPC applications that enables high-performance execution of Wasm code, has low-overhead for MPI calls, and supports high-performance networking interconnects present on HPC systems. We evaluate the performance and overhead of MPIWasm on a production HPC system and AWS Graviton2 nodes using standardized HPC benchmarks. Results from our experiments demonstrate that MPIWasm delivers competitive native application performance across all scenarios. Moreover, we observe that Wasm binaries are 139.5x smaller on average as compared to the statically-linked binaries for the different standardized benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 Linux 内核提供的命名空间的容器化方法在 HPC 社区中越来越受欢迎，既可以作为隔离应用程序的方法，也可以作为打包和分发应用程序的格式。然而，它们在 HPC 系统中的采用和使用面临着一些挑战。其中包括直接在 HPC 资源上非特权运行和构建科学应用程序容器映像的困难、增加 HPC 架构的异构性以及访问仅在 HPC 系统上可用的专用网络库。基于容器的 HPC 应用程序开发的这些挑战与称为 WebAssembly (Wasm) 的新通用中间二进制格式所提供的多种优势密切相关。其中包括轻量级用户空间隔离机制以及跨操作系统和处理器架构的可移植性。在本文中，我们探索使用 Wasm 作为基于 MPI 的 HPC 应用程序的分发格式。为此，我们推出了 MPIWasm，这是一种适用于基于 MPI 的 HPC 应用程序的新型 Wasm 嵌入器，可实现 Wasm 代码的高性能执行，MPI 调用的开销较低，并支持 HPC 系统上存在的高性能网络互连。我们使用标准化 HPC 基准评估生产 HPC 系统和 AWS Graviton2 节点上的 MPIWasm 的性能和开销。我们的实验结果表明，MPIWasm 在所有场景中都能提供具有竞争力的本机应用程序性能。此外，我们观察到，与不同标准化基准的静态链接二进制文件相比，Wasm 二进制文件平均小 139.5 倍。

papers.title: Fast and Scalable Channels in Kotlin Coroutines.
papers.abstract: Asynchronous programming has gained significant popularity over the last decade: support for this programming pattern is available in many popular languages via libraries and native language implementations, typically in the form of coroutines or the async/await construct. Instead of programming via shared memory, this concept assumes implicit synchronization through message passing. The key data structure enabling such communication is the rendezvous channel. Roughly, a rendezvous channel is a blocking queue of size zero, so both send(e) and receive() operations wait for each other, performing a rendezvous when they meet. To optimize the message passing pattern, channels are usually equipped with a fixed-size buffer, so sends do not suspend and put elements into the buffer until its capacity is exceeded. This primitive is known as a buffered channel.
papers.abstract_zh: 异步编程在过去十年中获得了极大的普及：许多流行语言都可以通过库和本机语言实现来支持这种编程模式，通常以协程或 async/await 结构的形式。这个概念不是通过共享内存进行编程，而是通过消息传递假设隐式同步。实现这种通信的关键数据结构是会合通道。粗略地说，集合点通道是一个大小为零的阻塞队列，因此 send(e) 和 receive() 操作都相互等待，在它们相遇时执行集合点。为了优化消息传递模式，通道通常配备固定大小的缓冲区，因此发送不会挂起并将元素放入缓冲区，直到超出其容量。该原语称为缓冲通道。

papers.title: Fast Parallel Exact Inference on Bayesian Networks.
papers.abstract: Bayesian networks (BNs) are attractive, because they are graphical and interpretable machine learning models. However, exact inference on BNs is time-consuming, especially for complex problems. To improve the efficiency, we propose a fast BN exact inference solution named Fast-BNI on multi-core CPUs. Fast-BNI enhances the efficiency of exact inference through hybrid parallelism that tightly integrates coarse- and fine-grained parallelism. We also propose techniques to further simplify the bottleneck operations of BN exact inference. Fast-BNI source code is freely available at https://github.com/jjiantong/FastBN.
papers.abstract_zh: 贝叶斯网络（BN）很有吸引力，因为它们是图形化且可解释的机器学习模型。然而，对 BN 的精确推断非常耗时，尤其是对于复杂的问题。为了提高效率，我们提出了一种在多核CPU上的快速BN精确推理解决方案，名为Fast-BNI。 Fast-BNI 通过紧密集成粗粒度和细粒度并行的混合并行来提高精确推理的效率。我们还提出了进一步简化 BN 精确推理的瓶颈操作的技术。 Fast-BNI 源代码可在 https://github.com/jjiantong/FastBN 免费获取。

papers.title: Fast Symmetric Eigenvalue Decomposition via WY Representation on Tensor Core.
papers.abstract: Symmetric eigenvalue decomposition (EVD) is a fundamental analytic and numerical tool used in many scientific areas. The state-of-the-art algorithm in terms of performance is typically the two-stage tridiagonalization method. The first stage in the two-stage tridiagonalization is called successive band reduction (SBR), which reduces a symmetric matrix to a band form, and its computational cost usually dominates. When Tensor Core (specialized matrix computational accelerator) is used to accelerate the expensive EVD, the conventional ZY-representation-based method results in suboptimal performance due to unfavorable shapes of the matrix computations. In this paper, we propose a new method that uses WY representation instead of ZY representation (see Section 3.2 for details), which can provide a better combination of locality and parallelism so as to perform better on Tensor Cores. Experimentally, the proposed method can bring up to 3.7x speedup in SBR and 2.3x in the entire EVD compared to state-of-the-art implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 对称特征值分解 (EVD) 是许多科学领域使用的基本分析和数值工具。就性能而言，最先进的算法通常是两阶段三对角化方法。两阶段三对角化的第一阶段称为连续带缩减（SBR），它将对称矩阵减少为带形式，其计算成本通常占主导地位。当使用 Tensor Core（专用矩阵计算加速器）来加速昂贵的 EVD 时，传统的基于 ZY 表示的方法会因矩阵计算的形状不佳而导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 WY 表示而不是 ZY 表示的新方法（详细信息请参见第 3.2 节），它可以提供局部性和并行性的更好组合，从而在 Tensor Core 上表现更好。通过实验，与最先进的实现相比，所提出的方法可以在 SBR 中实现高达 3.7 倍的加速，在整个 EVD 中实现高达 2.3 倍的加速。

papers.title: Generating Fast FFT Kernels on CPUs via FFT-Specific Intrinsics.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes an algorithm-specific instruction (ASI)-based fast Fourier transform (FFT) code generation framework, named FFTASI, to generate unified architecture independent butterfly kernels that can be transformed into architecture-dependent kernels by establishing the mapping between ASIs and architecture-specific instructions for various hardware platforms. FFTASI strikes a good balance between performance and productivity on CPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于算法特定指令（ASI）的快速傅立叶变换（FFT）代码生成框架，名为FFTASI，用于生成统一的架构无关的蝴蝶内核，通过建立ASI和各种硬件平台的架构特定指令之间的映射，可以将其转换为架构相关的内核。 FFTASI 在 CPU 的性能和生产力之间取得了良好的平衡。

papers.title: High-Performance and Scalable Agent-Based Simulation with BioDynaMo.
papers.abstract: Agent-based modeling plays an essential role in gaining insights into biology, sociology, economics, and other fields. However, many existing agent-based simulation platforms are not suitable for large-scale studies due to the low performance of the underlying simulation engines. To overcome this limitation, we present a novel high-performance simulation engine.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于主体的建模在深入了解生物学、社会学、经济学和其他领域中发挥着重要作用。然而，由于底层仿真引擎的性能较低，许多现有的基于代理的仿真平台不适合大规模研究。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了一种新颖的高性能模拟引擎。

papers.title: High-Performance Filters for GPUs.
papers.abstract: Filters approximately store a set of items while trading off accuracy for space-efficiency and can address the limited memory on accelerators, such as GPUs. However, there is a lack of high-performance and feature-rich GPU filters as most advancements in filter research has focused on CPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 过滤器大约存储一组项目，同时牺牲准确性以换取空间效率，并且可以解决 GPU 等加速器上的有限内存问题。然而，由于滤波器研究的大部分进展都集中在 CPU 上，因此缺乏高性能和功能丰富的 GPU 滤波器。

papers.title: High-Performance GPU-to-CPU Transpilation and Optimization via High-Level Parallel Constructs.
papers.abstract: While parallelism remains the main source of performance, architectural implementations and programming models change with each new hardware generation, often leading to costly application re-engineering. Most tools for performance portability require manual and costly application porting to yet another programming model.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然并行性仍然是性能的主要来源，但架构实现和编程模型随着每一代新硬件的变化而变化，通常会导致成本高昂的应用程序重新设计。大多数用于性能可移植性的工具都需要手动且昂贵的应用程序移植到另一个编程模型。

papers.title: High-Throughput GPU Random Walk with Fine-Tuned Concurrent Query Processing.
papers.abstract: Random walk serves as a powerful tool in dealing with large-scale graphs, reducing data size while preserving structural information. Unfortunately, existing system frameworks all focus on the execution of a single walker task in serial. We propose CoWalker, a high-throughput GPU random walk framework tailored for concurrent random walk tasks. It introduces a multi-level concurrent execution model to allow concurrent random walk tasks to efficiently share GPU resources with low overhead. Our system prototype confirms that the proposed system could outperform (up to 54%) the state-of-the-art in a wide spectral of scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 随机游走是处理大规模图的强大工具，可以减少数据大小，同时保留结构信息。不幸的是，现有的系统框架都专注于串行执行单个步行者任务。我们提出了 CoWalker，一种专为并发随机游走任务量身定制的高吞吐量 GPU 随机游走框架。它引入了多级并发执行模型，允许并发随机游走任务以较低的开销高效共享 GPU 资源。我们的系统原型证实，所提出的系统在多种场景下都可以超越最先进的系统（高达 54%）。

papers.title: Improving Energy Saving of One-Sided Matrix Decompositions on CPU-GPU Heterogeneous Systems.
papers.abstract: One-sided dense matrix decompositions (e.g., Cholesky, LU, and QR) are the key components in scientific computing in many different fields. Although their design has been highly optimized for modern processors, they still consume a considerable amount of energy. As CPU-GPU heterogeneous systems are commonly used for matrix decompositions, in this work, we aim to further improve the energy saving of onesided matrix decompositions on CPU-GPU heterogeneous systems. We first build an Algorithm-Based Fault Tolerance protected overclocking technique (ABFT-OC) to enable us to exploit reliable overclocking for key matrix decomposition operations. Then, we design an energy-saving matrix decomposition framework, Bi-directional Slack Reclamation (BSR), that can intelligently combine the capability provided by ABFT-OC and DVFS to maximize energy saving and maintain performance and reliability. Experiments show that BSR is able to save up to 11.7% more energy compared with the current best energy saving optimization approach with no performance degradation and up to 14.1% Energy×Delay2 reduction. Also, BSR enables the Pareto efficient performance-energy trade-off, which is able to provide up to 1.43× performance improvement without costing extra energy.
papers.abstract_zh: 单边密集矩阵分解（例如 Cholesky、LU 和 QR）是许多不同领域科学计算的关键组成部分。尽管它们的设计针对现代处理器进行了高度优化，但它们仍然消耗大量能量。由于CPU-GPU异构系统通常用于矩阵分解，因此在这项工作中，我们的目标是进一步提高CPU-GPU异构系统上单边矩阵分解的节能性。我们首先构建了一种基于算法的容错保护超频技术（ABFT-OC），使我们能够利用可靠的超频来进行关键矩阵分解操作。然后，我们设计了一种节能矩阵分解框架——双向松弛回收（BSR），它可以智能地结合ABFT-OC和DVFS提供的能力，以最大限度地节能并保持性能和可靠性。实验表明，与目前最好的节能优化方法相比，BSR 能够节省高达 11.7% 的能源，且性能没有下降，并且 Energy×Delay2 降低高达 14.1%。此外，BSR 还实现了帕累托高效的性能与能源权衡，能够在不消耗额外能源的情况下提供高达 1.43 倍的性能提升。

papers.title: iQAN: Fast and Accurate Vector Search with Efficient Intra-Query Parallelism on Multi-Core Architectures.
Learning to Parallelize in a Shared-Memory Environment with Transformers.
papers.abstract: In past years, the world has switched to multi and many core shared memory architectures. As a result, there is a growing need to utilize these architectures by introducing shared memory parallelization schemes, such as OpenMP, to applications. Nevertheless, introducing OpenMP work-sharing loop construct into code, especially legacy code, is challenging due to pervasive pitfalls in management of parallel shared memory. To facilitate the performance of this task, many source-to-source (S2S) compilers have been created over the years, tasked with inserting OpenMP directives into code automatically. In addition to having limited robustness to their input format, these compilers still do not achieve satisfactory coverage and precision in locating parallelizable code and generating appropriate directives. In this work, we propose leveraging recent advances in machine learning techniques, specifically in natural language processing (NLP), to suggest the need for an OpenMP work-sharing loop directive and data-sharing attributes clauses --- the building blocks of concurrent programming. We train several transformer models, named PragFormer, for these tasks and show that they outperform statistically-trained baselines and automatic source-to-source (S2S) parallelization compilers in both classifying the overall need for an parallel for directive and the introduction of private and reduction clauses. In the future, our corpus can be used for additional tasks, up to generating entire OpenMP directives. The source code and database for our project can be accessed on GitHub 1 and HuggingFace 2.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，世界已经转向多核和多核共享内存架构。因此，越来越需要通过向应用程序引入共享内存并行化方案（例如 OpenMP）来利用这些架构。然而，由于并行共享内存管理中普遍存在的缺陷，将 OpenMP 工作共享循环构造引入代码（尤其是遗留代码）具有挑战性。为了促进此任务的执行，多年来创建了许多源到源 (S2S) 编译器，其任务是自动将 OpenMP 指令插入代码中。除了输入格式的鲁棒性有限之外，这些编译器在定位可并行代码和生成适当的指令方面仍然没有达到令人满意的覆盖范围和精度。在这项工作中，我们建议利用机器学习技术（特别是自然语言处理 (NLP)）方面的最新进展，提出对 OpenMP 工作共享循环指令和数据共享属性子句（并发编程的构建块）的需求。我们为这些任务训练了几个名为 PragFormer 的变压器模型，并表明它们在对并行 for 指令的总体需求进行分类以及引入私有和缩减子句方面都优于统计训练的基线和自动源到源 (S2S) 并行化编译器。将来，我们的语料库可用于其他任务，直至生成整个 OpenMP 指令。我们项目的源代码和数据库可以在 GitHub 1 和 HuggingFace 2 上访问。

papers.title: Lifetime-Based Optimization for Simulating Quantum Circuits on a New Sunway Supercomputer.
papers.abstract: High-performance classical simulator for quantum circuits, in particular the tensor network contraction algorithm, has become an important tool for the validation of noisy quantum computing. In order to address the memory limitations, the slicing technique is used to reduce the tensor dimensions, but it could also lead to additional computation overhead that greatly slows down the overall performance. This paper proposes novel lifetime-based methods to reduce the slicing overhead and improve the computing efficiency, including, an interpretation method to deal with slicing overhead, an inplace slicing strategy to find the smallest slicing set and an adaptive tensor network contraction path refiner customized for Sunway architecture. Experiments show that in most cases the slicing overhead with our inplace slicing strategy would be less than the Cotengra, which is the most used graph path optimization software at present. Finally, the resulting simulation time is reduced to 96.1s for the Sycamore quantum processor RQC, with a sustainable single-precision performance of 308.6Pflops using over 41M cores to generate 1M correlated samples, which is more than 5 times performance improvement compared to 60.4 Pflops in 2021 Gordon Bell Prize work.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能量子电路经典模拟器，特别​​是张量网络收缩算法，已成为验证噪声量子计算的重要工具。为了解决内存限制，使用切片技术来减少张量维度，但它也可能导致额外的计算开销，从而大大降低整体性能。本文提出了基于生命周期的新方法来减少切片开销并提高计算效率，包括处理切片开销的解释方法、寻找最小切片集的就地切片策略以及为Sunway架构定制的自适应张量网络收缩路径细化器。实验表明，在大多数情况下，我们的就地切片策略的切片开销将小于目前最常用的图路径优化软件Cotengra。最终，Sycamore 量子处理器 RQC 的仿真时间缩短至 96.1 秒，使用超过 41M 核心生成 100 万个相关样本，可持续单精度性能为 308.6Pflops，与 2021 年戈登贝尔奖工作中的 60.4 Pflops 相比，性能提升了 5 倍以上。

papers.title: Merchandiser: Data Placement on Heterogeneous Memory for Task-Parallel HPC Applications with Load-Balance Awareness.
OpenCilk: A Modular and Extensible Software Infrastructure for Fast Task-Parallel Code.
PiPAD: Pipelined and Parallel Dynamic GNN Training on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Dynamic Graph Neural Networks (DGNNs) have been broadly applied in various real-life applications, such as link prediction and pandemic forecast, to capture both static structural information and temporal characteristics from dynamic graphs. Combining both time-dependent and -independent components, DGNNs manifest substantial parallel computation and data reuse potentials, but suffer from severe memory access inefficiency and data transfer overhead under the canonical one-graph-at-a-time training pattern. To tackle the challenges, we propose PiPAD, a $\underline{\textbf{Pi}}pelined$ and $\underline{\textbf{PA}}rallel$ $\underline{\textbf{D}}GNN$ training framework for the end-to-end performance optimization on GPUs. From both the algorithm and runtime level, PiPAD holistically reconstructs the overall training paradigm from the data organization to computation manner. Capable of processing multiple graph snapshots in parallel, PiPAD eliminates the unnecessary data transmission and alleviates memory access inefficiency to improve the overall performance. Our evaluation across various datasets shows PiPAD achieves $1.22\times$-$9.57\times$ speedup over the state-of-the-art DGNN frameworks on three representative models.
papers.abstract_zh: 动态图神经网络（DGNN）已广泛应用于各种现实生活中，例如链接预测和流行病预测，以从动态图中捕获静态结构信息和时间特征。 DGNN 结合了时间相关和独立的组件，表现出大量的并行计算和数据重用潜力，但在规范的一次一张图训练模式下，存在严重的内存访问效率低下和数据传输开销的问题。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 PiPAD，一个 $\underline{\textbf{Pi}}pelined$ 和 $\underline{\textbf{PA}}rallel$ $\underline{\textbf{D}}GNN$ 训练框架，用于 GPU 上的端到端性能优化。 PiPAD从算法和运行时层面全面重构了从数据组织到计算方式的整体训练范式。 PiPAD 能够并行处理多个图形快照，消除了不必要的数据传输，并缓解了内存访问效率低下的问题，从而提高了整体性能。我们对各种数据集的评估表明，PiPAD 在三个代表性模型上比最先进的 DGNN 框架实现了 $1.22\times$-$9.57\times$ 加速。

papers.title: Practically and Theoretically Efficient Garbage Collection for Multiversioning.
papers.abstract: Multiversioning is widely used in databases, transactional memory, and concurrent data structures. It can be used to support read-only transactions that appear atomic in the presence of concurrent update operations. Any system that maintains multiple versions of each object needs a way of efficiently reclaiming them. We experimentally compare various existing reclamation techniques by applying them to a multiversion tree and a multiversion hash table.
papers.abstract_zh: 多版本技术广泛应用于数据库、事务内存和并发数据结构。它可用于支持在存在并发更新操作时显得原子的只读事务。任何维护每个对象的多个版本的系统都需要一种有效回收它们的方法。我们通过将各种现有的回收技术应用于多版本树和多版本哈希表来进行实验比较。

papers.title: Provably Fast and Space-Efficient Parallel Biconnectivity.
papers.abstract: Computing biconnected components (BCC) of a graph is a fundamental graph problem. The canonical parallel BCC algorithm is the Tarjan-Vishkin algorithm, which has O(n + m) optimal work and polylogarithmic span on a graph with n vertices and m edges. However, Tarjan-Vishkin is not widely used in practice. We believe the reason is the space-inefficiency (it uses O(m) extra space). In practice, existing parallel implementations are based on breath-first search (BFS). Since BFS has span proportional to the diameter of the graph, existing parallel BCC implementations suffer from poor performance on large-diameter graphs and can be slower than the sequential algorithm on many real-world graphs.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算图的双连通分量 (BCC) 是一个基本的图问题。典型的并行 BCC 算法是 Tarjan-Vishkin 算法，该算法在具有 n 个顶点和 m 个边的图上具有 O(n + m) 最优工作和多对数跨度。然而，Tarjan-Vishkin 在实践中并未得到广泛应用。我们认为原因是空间效率低下（它使用了 O(m) 额外空间）。在实践中，现有的并行实现基于呼吸优先搜索（BFS）。由于 BFS 的跨度与图的直径成正比，因此现有的并行 BCC 实现在大直径图上性能较差，并且可能比许多现实世界图上的顺序算法慢。

papers.title: Provably Good Randomized Strategies for Data Placement in Distributed Key-Value Stores.
papers.abstract: Distributed storage systems are used widely in clouds, databases, and file systems. These systems store a large amount of data across multiple servers. When a request to access data comes in, it is routed to the appropriate server, queued, and eventually processed. If the server's queue is full, then requests may be rejected. Thus, one important challenge when designing the algorithm for allocating data to servers is the fact that the request pattern may be unbalanced, unpredictable, and may change over time. If some servers get a large fraction of the requests, they are overloaded, leading to many rejects. In this paper, we analyze this problem theoretically under adversarial assumptions. In particular, we assume that the request sequence is generated by an adversarial process to maximize the number of rejects and analyze the performance of various algorithmic strategies in terms of the fraction of the requests rejected. We show that no deterministic strategy can perform well. On the other hand, a simple randomized strategy guarantees that at most a constant fraction of requests are rejected in expectation. We also show that moving data to load balance is essential if we want to reject a very small fraction (1/m where m is the number of servers) of requests. We design a strategy with randomization and data transfer to achieve this performance with speed augmentation. Finally, we conduct experiments and show that our algorithms perform well in practice.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式存储系统广泛应用于云、数据库和文件系统。这些系统在多个服务器上存储大量数据。当访问数据的请求传入时，它将被路由到适当的服务器，排队并最终进行处理。如果服务器的队列已满，则请求可能会被拒绝。因此，在设计向服务器分配数据的算法时，一个重要的挑战是请求模式可能不平衡、不可预测，并且可能随时间而变化。如果某些服务器收到大部分请求，它们就会过载，导致许多拒绝。在本文中，我们在对抗性假设下从理论上分析了这个问题。特别是，我们假设请求序列是由对抗过程生成的，以最大化拒绝数量，并根据拒绝的请求比例分析各种算法策略的性能。我们表明，没有任何确定性策略能够表现良好。另一方面，简单的随机策略保证最多有恒定比例的请求被预期拒绝。我们还表明，如果我们想要拒绝一小部分（1/m，其中 m 是服务器数量）请求，则将数据移动到负载平衡至关重要。我们设计了一种具有随机化和数据传输的策略，以通过速度增强来实现这种性能。最后，我们进行了实验并表明我们的算法在实践中表现良好。

papers.title: Stream-K: Work-Centric Parallel Decomposition for Dense Matrix-Matrix Multiplication on the GPU.
papers.abstract: We introduce Stream-K, a work-centric parallelization of matrix multiplication (GEMM) and related computations in dense linear algebra. Whereas contemporary decompositions are primarily tile-based, our method operates by partitioning an even share of the aggregate inner loop iterations among physical processing elements. This provides a near-perfect utilization of computing resources, regardless of how efficiently the output tiling for any given problem quantizes across the underlying processing elements. On GPU processors, our Stream-K parallelization of GEMM produces a peak speedup of up to 14$\times$ and 6.7$\times$, and an average performance response that is both higher and more consistent across 32,824 GEMM problem geometries than state-of-the-art math libraries such as CUTLASS and cuBLAS. Furthermore, we achieve this performance from a single tile size configuration per floating-point precision, whereas today's math libraries employ complex kernel-selection heuristics to select from a large ensemble of kernel variants.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Stream-K，一种以工作为中心的矩阵乘法并行化 (GEMM) 以及稠密线性代数中的相关计算。虽然当代的分解主要是基于图块的，但我们的方法通过在物理处理元素之间划分均匀份额的聚合内循环迭代来进行操作。这提供了对计算资源的近乎完美的利用，无论任何给定问题的输出平铺在底层处理元素上量化的效率如何。在 GPU 处理器上，我们的 GEMM Stream-K 并行化可产生高达 14$\times$ 和 6.7$\times$ 的峰值加速，并且在 32,824 个 GEMM 问题几何图形中的平均性能响应比 CUTLASS 和 cuBLAS 等最先进的数学库更高且更一致。此外，我们通过每个浮点精度的单个瓦片大小配置来实现这种性能，而当今的数学库采用复杂的内核选择启发式方法从大量内核变体中进行选择。

papers.title: Swift: Expedited Failure Recovery for Large-Scale DNN Training.
papers.abstract: As the size of deep learning models gets larger and larger, training takes longer time and more resources, making fault tolerance more and more critical. Existing state-of-the-art methods like CheckFreq and Elastic Horovod need to back up a copy of the model state (i.e., parameters and optimizer states) in memory, which is costly for large models and leads to non-trivial overhead. This paper presents SWIFT, a novel recovery design for distributed deep neural network training that significantly reduces the failure recovery overhead without affecting training throughput and model accuracy. Instead of making an additional copy of the model state, SWIFT resolves the inconsistencies of the model state caused by the failure and exploits the replicas of the model state in data parallelism for failure recovery. We propose a logging-based approach when replicas are unavailable, which records intermediate data and replays the computation to recover the lost state upon a failure. The re-computation is distributed across multiple machines to accelerate failure recovery further. We also log intermediate data selectively, exploring the trade-off between recovery time and intermediate data storage overhead. Evaluations show that SWIFT significantly reduces the failure recovery time and achieves similar or better training throughput during failure-free execution compared to state-of-the-art methods without degrading final model accuracy. SWIFT can also achieve up to 1.16x speedup in total training time compared to state-of-the-art methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型的规模越来越大，训练需要更长的时间和更多的资源，使得容错变得越来越重要。现有最先进的方法（例如 CheckFreq 和 Elastic Horovod）需要在内存中备份模型状态（即参数和优化器状态）的副本，这对于大型模型来说成本高昂，并会导致不小的开销。本文提出了 SWIFT，一种用于分布式深度神经网络训练的新颖恢复设计，可显着降低故障恢复开销，而不影响训练吞吐量和模型准确性。 SWIFT 不是制作模型状态的额外副本，而是解决由故障引起的模型状态的不一致，并利用数据并行性中的模型状态副本进行故障恢复。当副本不可用时，我们提出了一种基于日志记录的方法，该方法记录中间数据并重播计算以在发生故障时恢复丢失的状态。重新计算分布在多台机器上，以进一步加速故障恢复。我们还选择性地记录中间数据，探索恢复时间和中间数据存储开销之间的权衡。评估表明，与最先进的方法相比，SWIFT 显着缩短了故障恢复时间，并在无故障执行期间实现了类似或更好的训练吞吐量，且不会降低最终模型的准确性。与最先进的方法相比，SWIFT 的总训练时间还可实现高达 1.16 倍的加速。

papers.title: TDC: Towards Extremely Efficient CNNs on GPUs via Hardware-Aware Tucker Decomposition.
papers.abstract: Tucker decomposition is one of the SOTA CNN model compression techniques. However, unlike the FLOPs reduction, we observe very limited inference time reduction with Tucker-compressed models using existing GPU software such as cuDNN. To this end, we propose an efficient end-to-end framework that can generate highly accurate and compact CNN models via Tucker decomposition and optimized inference code on GPUs. Specifically, we propose an ADMM-based training algorithm that can achieve highly accurate Tucker-format models. We also develop a high-performance kernel for Tucker-format convolutions and analytical performance models to guide the selection of execution parameters. We further propose a co-design framework to determine the proper Tucker ranks driven by practical inference time (rather than FLOPs). Our evaluation on five modern CNNs with A100 demonstrates that our compressed models with our optimized code achieve up to 2.21X speedup over cuDNN, 1.12X speedup over TVM, and 3.27X over the original models using cuDNN with at most 0.05% accuracy loss.
papers.abstract_zh: Tucker分解是SOTA CNN模型压缩技术之一。然而，与 FLOP 减少不同，我们观察到使用现有 GPU 软件（例如 cuDNN）的 Tucker 压缩模型的推理时间减少非常有限。为此，我们提出了一种高效的端到端框架，可以通过 Tucker 分解和 GPU 上优化的推理代码生成高精度和紧凑的 CNN 模型。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于 ADMM 的训练算法，可以实现高精度的 Tucker 格式模型。我们还为 Tucker 格式卷积和分析性能模型开发了高性能内核，以指导执行参数的选择。我们进一步提出了一个协同设计框架来确定由实际推理时间（而不是 FLOP）驱动的适当的 Tucker 排名。我们对使用 A100 的五个现代 CNN 进行的评估表明，我们使用优化代码的压缩模型比 cuDNN 实现了高达 2.21 倍的加速，比 TVM 实现了 1.12 倍的加速，比使用 cuDNN 的原始模型实现了 3.27 倍的加速，但精度损失最多为 0.05%。

papers.title: TGOpt: Redundancy-Aware Optimizations for Temporal Graph Attention Networks.
The ERA Theorem for Safe Memory Reclamation.
papers.abstract: Safe memory reclamation (SMR) schemes for concurrent data structures offer trade-offs between three desirable properties: ease of integration, robustness, and applicability. In this paper we rigorously define SMR and these three properties, and we present the ERA theorem, asserting that any SMR scheme can only provide at most two of the three properties.
papers.abstract_zh: 并发数据结构的安全内存回收 (SMR) 方案在三个理想属性之间进行权衡：易于集成、稳健性和适用性。在本文中，我们严格定义了SMR和这三个属性，并提出了ERA定理，断言任何SMR方案最多只能提供这三个属性中的两个。

papers.title: The State-of-the-Art LCRQ Concurrent Queue Algorithm Does NOT Require CAS2.
TL4x: Buffered Durable Transactions on Disk as Fast as in Memory.
papers.abstract: This artifact includes YCSB and DB-bench benchmarks For TL4x, TrinityVRTL2, RocksSB, and Pmemkv, as well as the range-query benchmark from setbench for various data structures.
papers.abstract_zh: 该工件包括针对 TL4x、TrinityVRTL2、RocksSB 和 Pmemkv 的 YCSB 和 DB-bench 基准测试，以及来自 setbench 的针对各种数据结构的范围查询基准测试。

papers.title: Transactional Composition of Nonblocking Data Structures.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces nonblocking transaction composition (NBTC), a new methodology for atomic composition of nonblocking operations on concurrent data structures. Unlike previous software transactional memory (STM) approaches, NBTC leverages the linearizability of existing nonblocking structures, reducing the number of memory accesses that must be executed together, atomically, to only one per operation in most cases (these are typically the linearizing instructions of the constituent operations).
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了非阻塞事务组合（NBTC），这是一种对并发数据结构进行非阻塞操作原子组合的新方法。与以前的软件事务内存 (STM) 方法不同，NBTC 利用现有非阻塞结构的线性化能力，将必须以原子方式一起执行的内存访问数量减少到大多数情况下每个操作仅一次（这些通常是组成操作的线性化指令）。

papers.title: Unexpected Scaling in Path Copying Trees.
papers.abstract: Although a wide variety of handcrafted concurrent data structures have been proposed, there is considerable interest in universal approaches (Universal Constructions or UCs) for building concurrent data structures. UCs (semi-)automatically convert a sequential data structure into a concurrent one. The simplest approach uses locks [3, 6] that protect a sequential data structure and allow only one process to access it at a time. However, the resulting data structure is blocking. Most work on UCs instead focuses on obtaining non-blocking progress guarantees such as obstruction-freedom, lock-freedom or wait-freedom. Many non-blocking UCs have appeared. Key examples include the seminal wait-free UC [2] by Herlihy, a NUMA-aware UC [10] by Yi et al., and an efficient UC for large objects [1] by Fatourou et al.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管已经提出了各种各样的手工并发数据结构，但人们对构建并发数据结构的通用方法（通用构造或 UC）非常感兴趣。 UC（半）自动将顺序数据结构转换为并发数据结构。最简单的方法使用锁 [3, 6] 来保护顺序数据结构并一次只允许一个进程访问它。然而，生成的数据结构是阻塞的。大多数关于 UC 的工作都集中在获得非阻塞进度保证，例如无阻塞、无锁或无等待。许多非阻塞UC已经出现。关键示例包括 Herlihy 的开创性无等待 UC [2]、Yi 等人的 NUMA 感知 UC [10] 以及 Fatourou 等人的针对大型对象的高效 UC [1]。

papers.title: Visibility Algorithms for Dynamic Dependence Analysis and Distributed Coherence.
papers.abstract: Implicitly parallel programming systems must solve the joint problems of dependence analysis and coherence to ensure apparently-sequential semantics for applications run on distributed memory machines. Solving these problems in the presence of data-dependent control flow and arbitrary aliasing is a challenge that most existing systems eschew by compromising the expressivity of their programming models and/or the performance of their implementations. We demonstrate a general class of solutions to these problems via a reduction to the visibility problem from computer graphics.
papers.abstract_zh: 隐式并行编程系统必须解决依赖性分析和一致性的联合问题，以确保在分布式内存机器上运行的应用程序具有明显的顺序语义。在存在数据相关控制流和任意别名的情况下解决这些问题是大多数现有系统通过损害其编程模型的表达能力和/或其实现的性能而回避的挑战。我们通过减少计算机图形的可见性问题来展示这些问题的通用解决方案。

papers.title: WISE: Predicting the Performance of Sparse Matrix Vector Multiplication with Machine Learning.
A parallel branch-and-bound algorithm with history-based domination.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we describe a parallel Branch-and-Bound (B&B) algorithm with a history-based domination technique, and we apply it to the Sequential Ordering Problem (SOP). To the best of our knowledge, the proposed algorithm is the first parallel B&B algorithm that includes a history-based domination technique and is the first parallel B&B algorithm for solving the SOP using a pure B&B approach. The proposed algorithm takes a pool-based approach and employs a collection of novel techniques that we have developed to achieve effective parallel exploration of the solution space, including parallel history domination, history table memory management, and a thread restart technique. The proposed algorithm was experimentally evaluated using the SOPLIB and TSPLIB benchmarks. The results show that using ten threads with a time limit of one hour on the medium-difficulty instances, the proposed algorithm gives a geometric-mean speedup of 19.9 on SOPLIB and 10.23 on TSPLIB, with super-linear speedups up to 65x seen on 17 instances.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了一种具有基于历史的支配技术的并行分支定界（B＆B）算法，并将其应用于顺序排序问题（SOP）。据我们所知，所提出的算法是第一个包含基于历史的支配技术的并行 B&B 算法，也是第一个使用纯 B&B 方法求解 SOP 的并行 B&B 算法。所提出的算法采用基于池的方法，并采用了我们开发的一系列新技术来实现解决方案空间的有效并行探索，包括并行历史支配、历史表内存管理和线程重启技术。使用 SOPLIB 和 TSPLIB 基准对所提出的算法进行了实验评估。结果表明，在中等难度的实例上使用十个线程，时间限制为一小时，所提出的算法在 SOPLIB 上的几何平均加速为 19.9，在 TSPLIB 上的几何平均加速为 10.23，在 17 个实例上超线性加速高达 65 倍。

papers.title: A W-cycle algorithm for efficient batched SVD on GPUs.
papers.abstract: As a fundamental factorization operation, the singular value decomposition (SVD) plays a paramount role in abroad range of domains such as scientific computing and machine learning. Due to its computational bottleneck of factorization for small matrices in real-world applications, many GPU-accelerated batched SVD algorithms have been investigated recently. However, these algorithms failed to achieve a balance between data locality and parallelism because their workflows depend on the size of each matrix. In this work, we propose a matrix-size-independent W-cycle algorithm to accelerate the batched one-side Jacobi SVD on GPUs, which successfully strikes the balance between data locality and parallelism. The experimental evaluation demonstrates that the proposed algorithm achieves 4.5X performance speedup on average over the state-of-the-art cuSOLVER.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为一种基本的因式分解运算，奇异值分解（SVD）在科学计算和机器学习等广泛领域中发挥着至关重要的作用。由于实际应用中小矩阵分解的计算瓶颈，最近研究了许多 GPU 加速的批量 SVD 算法。然而，这些算法未能实现数据局部性和并行性之间的平衡，因为它们的工作流程取决于每个矩阵的大小。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种与矩阵大小无关的 W-cycle 算法来加速 GPU 上的批量单边 Jacobi SVD，成功地实现了数据局部性和并行性之间的平衡。实验评估表明，所提出的算法比最先进的 cuSOLVER 平均实现 4.5 倍的性能加速。

papers.title: An LLVM-based open-source compiler for NVIDIA GPUs.
papers.abstract: We present GASS, an LLVM-based open-source compiler for NVIDIA GPU's SASS machine assembly. GASS is the first open-source compiler targeting SASS, and it provides a unified toolchain for currently fragmented low-level performance research on NVIDIA GPUs. GASS supports all recent architectures, including Volta, Turing, and Ampere.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 GASS，这是一个基于 LLVM 的开源编译器，适用于 NVIDIA GPU 的 SASS 机器组装。 GASS是第一个针对SASS的开源编译器，它为目前分散的NVIDIA GPU低级性能研究提供了统一的工具链。 GASS 支持所有最新架构，包括 Volta、Turing 和 Ampere。

papers.title: Asymmetry-aware scalable locking.
papers.abstract: The pursuit of power-efficiency is popularizing asymmetric multicore processors (AMP) such as ARM big.LITTLE, Apple M1 and recent Intel Alder Lake with big and little cores. However, we find that existing scalable locks fail to scale on AMP and cause collapses in either throughput or latency, or both, because their implicit assumption of symmetric cores no longer holds. To address this issue, we propose the first asymmetry-aware scalable lock named LibASL. LibASL provides a new lock ordering guided by applications' latency requirements, which allows big cores to reorder with little cores for higher throughput under the condition of preserving applications' latency requirements. Using LibASL only requires linking the applications with it and, if latency-critical, inserting few lines of code to annotate the coarse-grained latency requirement. We evaluate LibASL in various benchmarks including five popular databases on Apple M1. Evaluation results show that LibASL can improve the throughput by up to 5 times while precisely preserving the tail latency designated by applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 对功效的追求正在普及非对称多核处理器 (AMP)，例如 ARM big.LITTLE、Apple M1 以及最新的具有大小核的英特尔 Alder Lake。然而，我们发现现有的可扩展锁无法在 AMP 上扩展，并导致吞吐量或延迟或两者兼而有之的崩溃，因为它们对对称核心的隐式假设不再成立。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了第一个非对称感知的可扩展锁，名为 LibASL。 LibASL 提供了一种以应用程序延迟要求为指导的新锁排序，允许大核对小核进行重新排序，从而在保留应用程序延迟要求的情况下获得更高的吞吐量。使用 LibASL 只需将应用程序与其链接起来，如果延迟至关重要，则插入几行代码来注释粗粒度延迟要求。我们在各种基准测试中评估 LibASL，包括 Apple M1 上的五个流行数据库。评估结果表明，LibASL 可以将吞吐量提高多达 5 倍，同时精确保留应用程序指定的尾部延迟。

papers.title: Automatic differentiation of parallel loops with formal methods.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel combination of reverse mode automatic differentiation and formal methods, to enable efficient differentiation of (or backpropagation through) shared-memory parallel loops. Compared to the state of the art, our approach can reduce the need for atomic updates or private data copies during the parallel derivative computation, even in the presence of unstructured or data-dependent data access patterns. This is achieved by gathering information about the memory access patterns from the input program, which is assumed to be correctly parallelized. This information is then used to build a model of assertions in a theorem prover, which can be used to check the safety of shared memory accesses during the parallel derivative loops. We demonstrate this approach on scientific computing benchmarks including a lattice-Boltzmann method (LBM) solver from the Parboil benchmark suite and a Green’s function Monte Carlo (GFMC) kernel from the CORAL benchmark suite.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了反向模式自动微分和形式化方法的新颖组合，以实现共享内存并行循环的有效微分（或通过反向传播）。与现有技术相比，我们的方法可以减少并行导数计算期间对原子更新或私有数据副本的需求，即使存在非结构化或数据依赖型数据访问模式。这是通过从输入程序收集有关内存访问模式的信息来实现的，假设输入程序已正确并行化。然后，该信息用于在定理证明器中构建断言模型，该模型可用于检查并行导数循环期间共享内存访问的安全性。我们在科学计算基准测试中演示了这种方法，包括来自 Parboil 基准测试套件的格子玻尔兹曼方法 (LBM) 求解器和来自 CORAL 基准测试套件的格林函数蒙特卡罗 (GFMC) 内核。

papers.title: Automatic synthesis of parallel unix commands and pipelines with KumQuat.
papers.abstract: We present KumQuat, a system for automatically generating data-parallel implementations of Unix shell commands and pipelines. The generated parallel versions split input streams, execute multiple instantiations of the original pipeline commands to process the splits in parallel, then combine the resulting parallel outputs to produce the final output stream. KumQuat automatically synthesizes the combine operators, with a domain-specific combiner language acting as a strong regularizer that promotes efficient inference of correct combiners. We present experimental results that show that these combiners enable the effective parallelization of our benchmark scripts.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 KumQuat，一个用于自动生成 Unix shell 命令和管道的数据并行实现的系统。生成的并行版本分割输入流，执行原始管道命令的多个实例以并行处理分割，然后组合生成的并行输出以生成最终输出流。 KumQuat 自动合成组合运算符，并使用特定于领域的组合器语言作为强大的正则化器，促进正确组合器的有效推理。我们提供的实验结果表明，这些组合器可以实现我们的基准脚本的有效并行化。

papers.title: BaGuaLu: targeting brain scale pretrained models with over 37 million cores.
Bundling linked data structures for linearizable range queries.
papers.abstract: We present bundled references, a new building block to provide linearizable range query operations for highly concurrent lock-based linked data structures. Bundled references allow range queries to traverse a path through the data structure that is consistent with the target atomic snapshot. We demonstrate our technique with three data structures: a linked list, skip list, and a binary search tree. Our evaluation reveals that in mixed workloads, our design can improve upon the state-of-the-art techniques by 1.2x-1.8x for a skip list and 1.3x-3.7x for a binary search tree. We also integrate our bundled data structure into the DBx1000 in-memory database, yielding up to 40% gain over the same competitors.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了捆绑引用，这是一个新的构建块，为高度并发的基于锁的链接数据结构提供可线性化的范围查询操作。捆绑引用允许范围查询遍历与目标原子快照一致的数据结构的路径。我们用三种数据结构演示我们的技术：链表、跳跃列表和二叉搜索树。我们的评估表明，在混合工作负载中，我们的设计可以将跳跃列表的最先进技术提高 1.2 倍至 1.8 倍，将二叉搜索树提高 1.3 倍至 3.7 倍。我们还将捆绑的数据结构集成到 DBx1000 内存数据库中，与相同竞争对手相比，性能提升高达 40%。

papers.title: CASE: a compiler-assisted SchEduling framework for multi-GPU systems.
Deadlock-free asynchronous message reordering in rust with multiparty session types.
papers.abstract: Rust is a modern systems language focused on performance and reliability. Complementing Rust's promise to provide "fearless concurrency", developers frequently exploit asynchronous message passing.
